Notes: Matches cloudflare_record.apex in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - resolves to oci_core_public_ip.citadel.ip_address at apply time - proxied=false (grey cloud - required for Traefik tlsChallenge/TLS-ALPN-01 ACME per infra/traefik/traefik.yml)
Matches cloudflare_record.api in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - a record in this zone (DNS-001) not a separate delegated api.trancendos.com zone - proxied=false

Matches cloudflare_record.the_workshop in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - real DNS record but currently non-functional at the HTTP layer - Forgejo's only Traefik router rule is Host(trancendos.com) && PathPrefix(/the-workshop) which does not match a the-workshop.trancendos.com Host header - a request to this bare subdomain will not reach Forgejo until a matching host rule is added - proxied=false

Matches cloudflare_record.spf in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - DNST-004 = TXT - hard-fails every sender because no relay is authorized yet (workers/email-service/worker.py's SMTP_HOST is unset by default - log-only mode) - add an include:/ip4: for the real relay and drop -all to ~all only once SMTP_HOST is actually configured - proxied=false (TXT records are never proxied)

Matches cloudflare_record.dmarc in deploy/terraform/oci-citadel-dns.tf - DNST-004 = TXT - p=none is deliberate: monitor-only until DNSR-005's SPF has real senders to align against - dmarc-reports@ mailbox does not exist yet (email-service isn't sending mail) so reports currently have nowhere to land - create it (or point rua/ruf elsewhere) before relying on these reports - tighten to p=quarantine then p=reject once SPF/DKIM are backed by a real relay - proxied=false
